query:
UPDATE users SET role = 'admin' WHERE name LIKE '%ULTRAMARE%' OR name LIKE '%Ultramare%';
SELECT id, name, email, role FROM users WHERE name LIKE '%ULTRAMARE%' OR name LIKE '%Ultramare%';
